series_metadata.series_title: Daily and Monthly Reconciliation of Distribution
series_metadata.series_description: The daily and monthly reconciliation is composed of different reports for recording the collect of Tax Distribution distributable revenues and the collect of deputy registrar agencies. This includes license revenue, permissive tax, IRP and special interest distribution.

retention_rules.trigger_desc: Paper: audited by Auditor of State and audit report completed and released ; Electronic: Information is also retained in Tax Distribution Data Base Computer System three years audit is released
